TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Wilt_Chamberlain, title = Wilt_Chamberlain, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wilt_Chamberlain} }

S.FORM: Wilt Chamberlain sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1936, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 4, Wilt Chamberlain, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1999) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Wilt Chamberlain sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1936, ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 4, Wilt Chamberlain, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1999) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: wilt ʦ~ʨħamβerlain s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, wilt ʦ~ʨħamβerlain, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
